MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-29-2003 Continued To Feb-09-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: G.D. Ramsey, Esq. for plaintiff
Annie Schynebaugh, Manager for Plaintiff, Diamond View Apts.
Frederico Martinez Martinez, Maintenance man for Plaintiff, Diamond View Apts.
Percy Williams, Defendant, in pro per

Unlawful detainer settlement conference held. Case settled on the record. Partial settlement terms are as follows: Defendant Percy Williams to remain in premises at 217 Addison Street, San Francisco, CA 94131. His sister Brenda Williams will apply to the Board to be approved as a subtenant. Matt Weaver to vacate the premises within 30 days. Defendant will change the locks immediately. The unpaid rent for the period of October through December 2003 in the amount of $3,060 shall be held in abeyance while defendant applies to the Board for compromise or payment plan. Monthly rent in the amount of $1,020 shall be henceforth paid on time beginning Jan. 1, 2004. Trial date continued to 2/9/04 at 9:00 AM in Department 206. Plaintiff shall contact Dept. 218 by Friday, 2/6/04 to inform the court whether or not the defendant has complied with the settlement terms.

JPT: Marte Bassi Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott CSR: Patty Van Steenberge (218)
